scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:security && npm run test:payments && npm run test:routes
scripts.test:unit: node --test --loader ./tests/ts-loader.js tests/subscription.test.ts tests/calendar-ics-sync.test.ts tests/schedule-connectors.test.ts tests/alumni-edit-roles.test.ts tests/forgot-password.test.ts tests/auth-callback.test.ts tests/auth-oauth-regressions.test.ts tests/invite-redirect.test.ts tests/oauth-signup-callback-url.test.ts tests/alumni-linkedin-url.test.ts tests/linkedin-*.test.ts tests/enterprise/*.test.ts tests/enterprise-quantity-pricing.test.ts tests/embed-url-policy.test.ts tests/friction-feedback-submit-contract.test.ts tests/friction-anonymous.test.ts tests/cursor-pagination.test.ts tests/org-theme-validation.test.ts tests/ai-*.test.ts
scripts.test:routes: node --test --loader ./tests/ts-loader.js tests/routes/stripe/*.test.ts tests/routes/organizations/*.test.ts tests/routes/enterprise/*.test.ts tests/routes/admin/*.test.ts tests/routes/schedules/*.test.ts tests/routes/calendar/*.test.ts tests/routes/chat/*.test.ts tests/routes/feedback/*.test.ts tests/routes/notifications/*.test.ts tests/routes/dev-admin/*.test.ts tests/routes/jobs/*.test.ts tests/routes/linkedin/*.test.ts tests/routes/members/*.test.ts tests/routes/ai/*.test.ts
scripts.gen:types: npx supabase gen types --lang=typescript --project-id rytsziwekhtjdqzzpdso > src/types/database.ts && node scripts/append-database-compat.js
